$comment: c78 (D-CSUBSET-FLOAT-NEG-ENCODING, 2026-07-01): floating-point negate -d. Capability-dispatched: arm64 native FNEG; x86 xorpd/xorps xmm,[rip+mask] against a 16-byte rodata SIGN-MASK (bit 63 double / bit 31 float) = gcc's form. The mask MUST be 16-byte aligned (legacy XORPD m128 #GP-faults otherwise) — objdump-confirmed 16-aligned on all targets incl. pe64 (the 4096-aligned PE section + per-item 16-aligned offset). IEEE-correct signed zero: -(+0.0)=-0.0 so 1.0/-0.0=-inf<0. Pre-fix fneg had NO encoding -> A_NoEncodingDeclared. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert lowerFNeg -> A_NoEncodingDeclared fneg. => 42.
